channel_semantics.red: waterline and wet-rock candidate edge from existing review-gated water mask dilation; not a production wetness mask
channel_semantics.green: deterministic side-waterfall and mist review bands near the Pacuare waterfall target station; not imagery-derived waterfall geometry
channel_semantics.blue: dense canopy / rescue-readability caution from existing vegetation mask and deterministic mist proximity

policy.allowed_use_before_rights_clear: Editor-side review, guide/outfitter discussion, and procedural placeholder planning only.
policy.blocked_use_before_rights_clear: Photoreal material extraction, texture derivation, photogrammetry, AI training, marketing, or production waterfall/wet-rock authority.

promotion_gate: Replace this deterministic review scaffold with guide/outfitter-approved, rights-cleared or first-party wet-rock, waterfall, mist, and rescue-readability annotations before production art or lifelike capture claims.
